ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., SD.lv1, Def.lv1) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test (e.g., t-test, ANOVA) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the test result */,
  "mean_in_category" REAL /* Mean within the category */,
  "overall_mean" REAL /* Overall mean */,
  "v_test" REAL /* v-test value */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "test_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, running, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., survey, experiment) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Excel, SQL) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation (e.g., university, company) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test performed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the test was performed on */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was recorded */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test (e.g., significant, not significant) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test result */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., t-test, ANOVA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example of how the test can be used */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Known limitations of the test */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or resources for further reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Log of activities during the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access granted (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "revoke_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was revoked */,
  "permission_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the permission */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Log of changes to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test that generated the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "viewer_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "dashboard_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the dashboard */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dashboard has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tutorials" (
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tutorial */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test the tutorial explains */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the tutorial */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the tutorial */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the tutorial was published */,
  "tutorial_format" TEXT /* Format of the tutorial (e.g., text, video) */,
  "tutorial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the tutorial in minutes */,
  "tutorial_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the tutorial has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tutorial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tutorials_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the external library or framework */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., machine learning, big data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "integration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the integration */,
  "integration_log" TEXT /* Log of integration activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan (e.g., basic, pro, enterprise) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
